toast.saved_to_session_history: Kar kọjjeḷọk ñan bwebwenato in jerbal eo!
toast.scenario_generation_failed_try_aga: Kōṃṃan jekjek in eo ear jab tōprak — kajjioñ bar juon alen
toast.share_code_copied_to_clipboard: Kakkien kōjjeḷọk in kar kapeel ñan clipboard!
toast.simulation_started_you_are_now_the: Simulation eo ear jino — kwōj kiiō ri-kōnnaan eo 🎭
toast.speech_recognition_not_supported_i: Speech recognition ejjab jerbal ilo browser in
toast.summary_generation_failed: Kōṃṃan kadu in ear jab tōprak
toast.switched_to_n_no_data_loaded: Kar oktak ñan N (ejjeḷọk data eaar load)
toast.you_have_unsaved_changes_consider_: 💡 Ewōr aṃ oktak ko rejjañin kọjjeḷọk — ḷōmṇak kōn kọjjeḷọk aṃ jerbal.
toast.autofilled_from_phase_tagged_entri: Kar make-kanne jān entries ko ewōr aer phase tag.
toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent: Aikuj ulōñ 2 baseline im 2 intervention entries ewōr aer phase tags.
toast.snapshot_rejected_entries: Kar kāālōt ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} entries ko rejjab jiṃwe (eḷḷaḷḷap/jab-jiṃwe timestamp ak field types ko rebōd). ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} entries ko rejiṃwe rej pād wōt ñan etale.
toast.transcript_no_json: AI ear jab kwaḷọk juon lajikaj ko remaroñ riiti.
toast.transcript_no_valid_entries: Lajikaj jān AI ear ejjeḷọk ABC entries rejiṃwe ie.
toast.share_code_too_large: Snapshot eḷḷap im jab tōllọk ñan kakkien kōjjeḷọk (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, joñan eo 5,000). Kōjerbal 💾 Download Snapshot ijo jeḷā.
ui.add_abc_entries_before_generating_a_r: Kobaiki ABC entries ṃokta jān aṃ kōṃṃan report.
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_progress_over_: Kobaiki ABC entries ñan lo wōnṃaanḷọk ilo iien
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d: Kobaiki ABC entries ñan lo data in trend in alikkar.
ui.add_connections_to_build_the_relation: Kobaiki kọkkeitaak ko ñan kalōk relationship map eo.
ui.add_data_points_above_or_paste_csv_da: Kobaiki data points ilōñ ak likūt CSV data ñan jino.
ui.ai_will_generate_visual_scenes_during: AI enaaj kōṃṃan scenes in alikkar iuṃwin kōnnaan eo (aikuj Imagen)
ui.aigenerated_meeting_preparation_packe: Packet in kōpooj kweilọk eo AI ear kōṃṃane jān aṃ behavioral data
ui.aipowered_pattern_analysis_with_proac: Etale wāween ilo kajoor in AI im ewōr strategies ñan bōbrae ṃokta
ui.aisynthesized_behavioral_profile_from: Profile in mwilin eo AI ear kobaik jān aolep unin data ko
ui.avoid_these_frequently_seen_errors_to: Kōjparok jān bōd kein eḷap aer waḷọk ñan kakōṃanṃan tōprak in mwil.
ui.behaviors_can_serve_multiple_function: Mwil ko remaroñ jerbal kōn ELŌÑ jerbal. Aolep iien kobaiki bwe en bwe data (10+ ABC entries) ṃokta jān aṃ kōṃṃan kōḷmenḷọkjeṇ eo aṃ. Kōjerbal kein jerbal in AI Pattern Analysis ñan kapen jān data.
ui.break_skills_into_teachable_steps_wit: Ruje kapeel ko ñan buñtōn ko remaroñ katakini kōn chaining im prompt tracking
ui.build_your_behavior_analysis_skills_s: Kalōk kapeel ko aṃ in etale mwil buñtōn-buñtōn
ui.calculate_tauu_nap_and_pnd_to_quantif: Bwini Tau-U, NAP, im PND ñan joñe joñan tōprak in intervention.
ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor: Kāālōt strategy in differential reinforcement eo ejejjet
ui.click_ai_generate_checklist_to_create: Kaḷōke "AI Generate Checklist" ñan kōṃṃan items ko pedped ioon BIP
ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel: Kaḷōke "Load Student Workspaces" im kāālōt elōñ .json files ko kar kọjjeḷọki jān BehaviorLens
ui.collect_some_abc_data_first_to_genera: Kobaiki jet ABC data ṃokta ñan kōṃṃan juon packet ewōr melele.
ui.create_your_first_replacement_behavio: Kōṃṃan aṃ ṃokta replacement behavior plan.
ui.crf_every_time_fr2_fr3_fr5_vr5_vr8_na: CRF (aolep iien) → FR-2 → FR-3 → FR-5 → VR-5 → VR-8 → Reinforcement in jaṃbel
ui.define_the_behaviors_settings_or_stud: Kameleḷe mwil ko, jikin ko, ak ri-jikuuḷ ko ñan staggered intervention.
ui.describe_your_research_question_and_l: Kwaḷọk aṃ kajjitōk in etale im likūt AI bwe en kwaḷọk design eo eṃṃantata.
ui.discrete_trial_training_with_mastery_: Discrete Trial Training kōn mastery tracking im auto-advance
ui.document_whether_interventions_are_im: Kọjjeḷọk eḷaññe interventions ko rej jerbali āinwōt kar deenjuoni
ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene: Kobaiki data ak record sessions ñan kōṃṃan juon cumulative record.
ui.family_voices_are_powerful_share_your: Ainikien baaṃle ewōr aer kajoor. Kwaḷọk aṃ observation ṃokta!
ui.functional_communication_training_pla: Kein jerbal in karōk ñan Functional Communication Training
ui.generate_a_multiweek_intervention_pla: Kōṃṃan juon plan in intervention iuṃwin elōñ wiik pedped ioon aṃ ABC data im AI analysis.
ui.generate_a_professional_printready_pr: Kōṃṃan juon report in wōnṃaanḷọk eṃṃan, ekkar ñan print, ewōr aer charts, kadu in data, im AI recommendations. Juon-click PDF export ilo browser print.
ui.generate_a_unique_scenario_tailored_t: Kōṃṃan juon jekjek in eo eṃakūt ñan aikuj in aṃ katak.
ui.generate_compliant_iep_behavioral_goa: Kōṃṃan IEP behavioral goals ko rejejjet jān observation data im ewōr present levels, SMART goals, im wōnṃaanḷọk monitoring.
ui.generate_iepready_progress_monitoring: Kōṃṃan IEP-ready paragraphs in wōnṃaanḷọk monitoring jān aṃ behavioral data eo kar kobaiki.
ui.generate_tailored_recommendations_bas: Kōṃṃan recommendations ko ekkar pedped ioon behavioral data im armej eo kar kāālōte.
ui.gently_surfaces_patterns_for_reflecti: Ineeṃṃan wāween kwaḷọki wāween ko ñan ḷōmṇak — eddek, jab nana
ui.get_ai_coaching_on_data_collection_qu: Bōk AI coaching kōn jiṃwe in aṃ kobaik data. Ej kile jikin ko reaikuj kakōṃanṃan, kwaḷọk wāween kakōṃanṃan, im joñe aṃ data.
ui.how_often_and_when_to_deliver_reinfor: Jete alen im ñāāt eo kwōj aikuj leḷọk reinforcement. Kōjerbal kein jerbal in Token Board ñan jerbali schedules kein ilo jerbal.
ui.identify_temporal_patterns_in_behavio: Kile wāween ko ilo iien kōn waḷọk in mwil
ui.import_student_profiles_or_historical: Bōktok profile ko an ri-jikuuḷ ak historical ABC data jān CSV files. Bōktok 10-15 ri-jikuuḷ ilo juon iien.
ui.load_multiple_student_workspace_files: Load elōñ files in student workspace ñan keidi wāween mwil, joñan kajoor, im trends side-by-side.
ui.map_target_behaviors_to_functionally_: Map mwil ko rej kein ekōṇaan ñan replacements ko renōnōnōn ilo jerbal
ui.measure_time_between_stimulus_present: Joñe iien ikōtaan kwaḷọk in stimulus im uwaak in mwil
ui.modify_the_environment_to_prevent_beh: Ukot pelaakin jikin eo ñan bōbrae mwil ko ṃokta jān aer jino
ui.natural_language_abc_entry: ABC Entry ilo Kajin in Jaṃbel
ui.need_at_least_3_abc_entries_for_patte: Aikuj ulōñ 3 ABC entries ñan kile wāween.
ui.need_at_least_5_abc_entries_for_patte: Aikuj ulōñ 5 ABC entries ñan etale wāween.
ui.no_abc_entries_to_check_yet_start_col: Ejjañin wōr ABC entries ñan etale. Jino kobaik data ṃokta!
ui.no_contacts_logged_yet_consistent_com: Ejjañin wōr contacts kar kọjjeḷọki. Kōnono pād wōt ej kalōk lōke!
ui.no_entries_yet_tap_log_a_behavior_to_: Ejjañin wōr entries. Uññūr "Log a Behavior" ñan jino!
ui.no_reflections_yet_tap_the_button_abo: Ejjañin wōr ḷōmṇak. Uññūr button eo ilōñ ñan etale ippaṃ make!
ui.no_session_data_recorded_yet: Ejjañin wōr session data kar record.
ui.no_team_notes_yet_start_the_conversat: Ejjañin wōr team notes. Jino kōnnaan eo!
ui.paste_one_value_per_line_supports_for: Likūt juon value ilo juon laajrak. Ej jerbal kōn formats: "5", "Session 1: 5", ak "1,5"
ui.please_use_chrome_edge_or_safari_for_: Jouj im kōjerbal Chrome, Edge, ak Safari ñan voice input.
ui.practice_clinical_reasoning_with_aige: Kamminene clinical reasoning kōn case studies ko AI ear kōṃṃani. Bōk expert-level uwaak ñan aṃ uwaak.
ui.prebuilt_scenarios_covering_the_4_fun: Jekjek in ko kar kōṃṃani ṃokta rej kalikkar 4 jerbal in mwil. Jerbal offline — ejjeḷọk aikuj AI.
ui.publicationstandard_singlecase_design: Graphs in single-case design ekkar ñan publication-standard
ui.read_through_the_module_content_above: Riiti aolep katak in module eo ilōñ, innām kaḷōke Complete ilaḷ.
ui.realtime_calming_tools_for_inthemomen: Kein jerbal in kaiññur ilo iien jerbal ñan jipañ ilo iien eo
ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data: Record sessions kōn Session Data Tracker, ak oktak ñan Manual Entry mode.
ui.remember_cultural_humility_is_a_lifel: Keememej: ettā būruon ilo manit ej juon kamminene iuṃwin aolep mour. Kajjojo ḷōmṇak ej kōṃṃan eok juon ri-jerbal eḷapḷọk an jiṃwe.
ui.review_your_abc_data_collection_for_c: Etale aṃ kobaik ABC data ñan dedeḷọk im jiṃwe
ui.select_a_research_design_to_structure: Kāālōt juon research design ñan kōṃṃan struktur ñan aṃ kobaik data
ui.share_workspace_data_with_team_member: Kakkien workspace data ippān ri-team ro. Role-based views rej kāālōt data ko rejejjet ñan BCBAs, ri-kaki, im jinen im jemen.
ui.speak_your_observations_naturally_ai_: Kōnono aṃ observations ilo wāween naturale. AI enaaj bōktok ABC entries jiṃwe jān aṃ transcript.
ui.stepbystep_scripts_for_healing_relati: Scripts buñtōn-buñtōn ñan kemour kakkoba im kalōk jukjuk in pād
ui.systematic_reinforcer_identification_: Kile reinforcer ilo wāween jejjet kōn protokols ko ewōr aer kein kaṃool
ui.test_your_behavioral_analysis_knowled: Mālejjoñ aṃ jeḷā kōn behavioral analysis — 80% ñan bōk aṃ badge
ui.track_behavior_frequency_over_time_wi: Track frequency in mwil ilo iien kōn aim lines, phase changes, im etale trend.
ui.track_behaviors_at_home_using_simple_: Track mwil ko ilo ṃweo kōn kajin pidodo, an raan ñan raan. Men in jipañ ajri eo aṃ\
ui.track_your_feelings_earn_badges_and_b: Track eññjake ko aṃ, bōk badges, im kalōk streaks!
ui.transform_deficitbased_language_into_: Ukōt kajin pedped ioon jepleak ñan kameḷeḷe ekkar ñan kajoor
ui.type_or_paste_your_observation_notes_: Type ak likūt aṃ observation notes ilo kajin English in raan ñan raan. AI enaaj kōṃṃani ñan ABC entries rejiṃwe.
ui.use_these_criteria_when_examining_you: Kōjerbal criteria kein ñe kwōj etale aṃ graph:
ui.use_this_flow_to_hypothesize_the_func: Kōjerbal flow in ñan kōṃṃan kōḷmenḷọkjeṇ kōn jerbal eo an mwil eo ekauwōtata.
ui.visual_multitiered_system_of_supports: Visual multi-tiered system of supports. Likūt ri-jikuuḷ ñan tiers, bōk AI-powered recommendations in likūt.
